ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each marketing channel
